## Candidate Submission Checklist

- [ ] I added exactly one submission file under `submissions/<your-name-or-id>.md`
- [ ] My submission includes `Q1`, `Q2`, `Q3`, and `Appendix - Evidence References`
- [ ] I removed any secrets/tokens/PII/raw sensitive payloads
- [ ] I clearly separated **Fact / Inference / Assumption / To-validate**

## Submission Metadata

- Candidate ID / Name:
- Analysis time window:
- Tools / workflow used:
- Key assumptions not fully validated:

## What Reviewers Should Focus On

- Evidence chain quality
- Noise vs impact judgment
- Prioritization rationale
- Workflow reusability and guardrails
